acceptance_criteria: At least 6 candidate child-domain/fission decisions are evaluated.
At least 10 candidate specialist agents are fully defined with authority ceilings and return contracts.
At least 10 concrete template packet drafts are created from gap analysis.
No registry/product-front-door landing occurs without explicit acceptance.
deliverables: focused tests, validation note, receipt, and G8 continuity export
non_claims: It does not authorize registry landing, product mutation, or external execution.
objective: Mine the dataset genesis corpus into concrete candidate subdomains, specialist agents, and first implementable template packets.
recommended_next_action: Run assistant-work dataset mining to propose child domains/agents/templates for PR-agent work, background-agent queue/intake, UI state modeling, migration work, release evidence, terminal proof, and example validation.
